a\n439\t * previous test into the current one.\n440\t *\n441\t * Each step is guarded so that individual test files which `vi.mock()` a\n442\t * module (replacing its exports with stubs) will not cause the entire\n443\t * cleanup to blow up — the missing reset function is simply skipped.\n444\t */\n445\texport async function cleanupAllState(): Promise<void> {\n446\t  // Helper: call `fn` only if it exists on the imported module.\n447\t  const tryReset = async (\n448\t    spec: string,\n449\t    ...fns: string[]\n450\t  ): Promise<void> => {\n451\t    try {\n452\t      const mod = await import(spec);\n453\t      for (const fn of fns) {\n454\t        if (typeof mod[fn] === \"function\") {\n455\t          await mod[fn]();\n456\t        }\n457\t      }\n458\t    } catch {\n459\t      // Module may be mocked or not reachable — skip silently.\n460\t    }\n461\t  };\n462\t\n463\t  // ---- cache.ts ----------------------------------------------------------\n464\t  await tryReset(\"../cache.js\", \"resetAllCacheStateForTesting\");\n465\t\n466\t  // ---- alerts-poller.ts ---------------------------------------------------\n467\t  await tryReset(\"../alerts-poller.js\", \"resetAlertsCacheForTesting\");\n468\t\n469\t  // ---- authentication.ts -------------------------------------------------\n470\t  await tryReset(\"../middleware/authentication.js\", \"resetAuthenticationState\");\n471\t\n472\t  // ---- api-key-management.ts ---------------------------------------------\n473\t  await tryReset(\"../middleware/api-key-management.js\", \"clearAllApiKeys\");\n474\t\n475\t  // ---- rate-limiter.ts ---------------------------------------------------\n476\t  await tryReset(\"../middleware/rate-limiter.js\", \"resetRateLimiter\");\n477\t\n478\t  // ---- auth-rate-limit.ts ------------------------------------------------\n479\t  await tryReset(\"../middleware/auth-rate-limit.js\", | \"admin\" = \"write\",\n  role: \"guest\" | \"user\" | \"admin\" = \"user\"\n): Promise<TestAuthCredentials> {\n  const keyId = `test_key_${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}`;\n  const apiKey */\nexport async function resetAllModuleState(): Promise<void> {\n  await cleanupAllState();\n}\n\n/**\n * Comprehensive cleanup of ALL shared mutable state across the server package.\n *\n * Call this in a `beforeEach` hook (or at the start of any test that needs\n * isolation) so that no module-level Map / Set / array leaks from a\n * previous test into the current one.\n *\n * Each step is guarded so that individual test files which `vi.mock()` a\n * module (replacing its exports with stubs) will not cause the entire\n * cleanup to blow up — the missing reset function is simply skipped.\n */\nexport async function cleanupAllState(): Promise<void> {\n  // Helper: call `fn` only if it exists on the imported module.\n  const tryReset = async (\n    spec: string,\n    ...fns: string[]\n  ): Promise<void> => {\n    try {\n      const mod = await import(spec);\n      for (const fn of fns) {\n        if (typeof mod[fn] === \"function\") {\n          await mod[fn]();\n        }\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Module may be mocked or not reachable — skip silently.\n    }\n  };\n\n  // ---- cache.ts ----------------------------------------------------------\n  await \"resetAuthenticationState\");\n\n  // ---- api-key-management.ts ---------------------------------------------\n  await tryReset(\"../middleware/api-key-management.js\", \"clearAllApiKeys\");\n\n  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// CSRF helpers for API tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n * Makes a GET request to /api/csrf-token and extracts the token.\n */\nexport async function getCsrfToken(app: {\n  request(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<Response>;\n}): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  if (res.status !== 200) {\n    throw new Error(`Failed to get CSRF token: ${res.status}`);\n  }\n  const body = (await res.json()) as { token: string };\n  return body.token;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n * Gets a fresh token and includes it in the X-CSRF-Token header.\n * Also merges in any provided authentication headers.\n */\nexport async function requestWithCsrf(\n  app: { request(path: string, init?: RequestInit): options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...authHeaders,\n Trip recording (manual, inferred from GTFS-RT, tracked)\n * - Commute journal query API\n * - Statistics calculation (average, median, std dev, trends)\n * - Trip inference from real-time data\n * - Resource-level access control (ownership checks)\n */\n\nimport type { CommuteStats, StationIndex, TripRecord, TripSource } from \"@mta-my-way/shared\";\nimport type Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport {\n  recordTripCreated,\n  recordTripQueried,\n  recordTripQueryDuration,\n  setActiveTripsCount,\n} from \"./middleware/metrics.js\";\nimport { logger } from \"./observability/logger.js\";\n\n// Default commute ID when no specific commute is configured\nconst DEFAULT_COMMUTE_ID = \"default\";\n\n// Database instance (set via initTripTracking)\nlet db: Database.Database | null = null;\nlet stations: StationIndex | null = null;\n\n// Default owner ID for unauthenticated or legacy data\nexport const DEFAULT_OWNER_ID = \"anonymous\";\n\n/**\n * Initialize trip tracking service.\n */\nexport function initTripTracking(database: Database.Database, stationData: StationIndex): void {\n  db = database;\n  stations = stationData;\n\n  // Run migrations\n  void import(\"./migration/index.js\").then(({ runMigrations }) => {\n    runMigrations(db!).catch((err) => {\n      logger.error(\n        \"Failed to run trip tracking migrations\",\n        err instanceof Error ? err : undefined\n      );\n    });\n  });\n\n  // Set initial active trips count\n  const totalTrips = getTotalTripCount();\n  setActiveTripsCount(totalTrips);\n\n  logger.info(\"Trip tracking initialized\", { totalTrips });\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Trip Recording\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Record a trip in the journal.\n *\n * @param trip - Trip data to record\n * @param ownerId - Owner ID for access control (defaults to \"anonymous\")\n */\nexport function recordTrip(\n  trip: Omit<TripRecord, \"id\">,\n  ownerId: string = DEFAULT_OWNER_ID\n): TripRecord | null {\n  if (!db) return null;\n\n  const id = crypto.randomUUID();\n  const now = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO trips (\n          id, date, origin_station_id, origin_station_name,\n          destination_station_id, destination_station_name, line, direction,\n          departure_time, arrival_time, actual_duration_minutes,\n          scheduled_duration_minutes, source, notes, created_at, updated_at, owner_id\n        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n    ).run(\n      id,\n      trip.date,\n      trip.origin.stationId,\n      trip.origin.stationName,\n      trip.destination.stationId,\n      trip.destination.stationName,\n      trip.line,\n      \"N\", // Default direction for manual trips\n      trip.departureTime,\n      trip.arrivalTime,\n      trip.actualDurationMinutes,\n      trip.scheduledDurationMinutes ?? null,\n      trip.source,\n      trip.notes ?? null,\n      now,\n      now,\n      ownerId\n    );\n\n    // Invalidate commute stats cache\n    invalidateCommuteStats(DEFAULT_COMMUTE_ID);\n\n    // Record trip created metric\n    recordTripCreated(trip.source, trip.line);\n\n    logger.info(\"Trip recorded\", {\n      tripId: id,\n      origin: trip.origin.stationName,\n      destination: trip.destination.stationName,\n      source: trip.source,\n      ownerId,\n      scheduledDurationMinutes: trip.scheduledDurationMinutes,\n    });\n\n    return { ...trip, id };\n  } catch (error) {\n    logger.error(\"Failed to record trip\", error instanceof Error ? error : undefined);\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Record a trip from GTFS-RT data (inferred).\n *\n * @param params - Trip parameters\n * @param ownerId - Owner ID for access control (defaults to \"anonymous\")\n */\nexport function recordInferredTrip(\n  params: {\n    tripId: string;\n    routeId: string;\n    direction: \"N\" | \"S\";\n    originId: string;\n    destinationId: string;\n    departureTime: number;\n    arrivalTime: number;\n  },\n  ownerId: string = DEFAULT_OWNER_ID\n): TripRecord | null {\n  if (!stations || !db) return null;\n\n  const originStation = stations[params.originId];\n  const destStation = stations[params.destinationId];\n\n  if (!originStation || !destStation) return null;\n\n  const actualDurationMinutes = Math.round((params.arrivalTime - params.departureTime) / 60);\n\n  const trip: Omit<TripRecord, \"id\"> = {\n    date: new Date(params.departureTime * 1000).toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]!,\n    origin: { stationId: params.originId, stationName: originStation.name },\n    destination: { stationId: params.destinationId, stationName: destStation.name },\n    line: params.routeId,\n    departureTime: params.departureTime * 1000,\n    arrivalTime: params.arrivalTime * 1000,\n    actualDurationMinutes,\n    source: \"inferred\",\n  };\n\n  return recordTrip(trip, ownerId);\n}\n\n/**\n * Update trip notes with ownership check.\n *\n * @param tripId - Trip ID to update\n * @param notes - New notes content\n * @param ownerId - Owner ID for access control (optional, skips check if not provided for backward compatibility)\n */\nexport function updateTripNotes(tripId: string, notes: string, ownerId?: string): boolean {\n  if (!db) return false;\n\n  try {\n    let stmt: Database.Statement;\n    const now = Date.now();\n\n    if (ownerId) {\n      // Only update if the trip belongs to the owner\n      stmt = db.prepare(\"UPDATE trips SET notes = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ? AND owner_id = ?\");\n      const result = stmt.run(notes, now, tripId, ownerId);\n\n      if (result.changes === 0) {\n        logger.warn(\"Trip notes update failed: ownership check failed\", { tripId, ownerId });\n      }\n\n      return result.changes > 0;\n    } else {\n      // No ownership check (for admin operations or backward compatibility)\n      stmt = db.prepare(\"UPDATE trips SET notes = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?\");\n      const result = stmt.run(notes, now, tripId);\n\n      return result.changes > 0;\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    logger.error(\"Failed to update trip notes\", error instanceof Error ? error : undefined);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Delete a trip from the journal with ownership check.\n *\n * @param tripId - Trip ID to delete\n * @param ownerId - Owner ID for access control (optional, skips check if not provided for backward compatibility)\n */\nexport function deleteTrip(tripId: string, ownerId?: string): boolean {\n  if (!db) return false;\n\n  try {\n    let stmt: Database.Statement;\n\n    if (ownerId) {\n      // Only delete if the trip belongs to the owner\n      stmt = db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM trips WHERE id = ? AND owner_id = ?\");\n      const result = stmt.run(tripId, ownerId);\n\n      if (result.changes === 0) {\n        logger.warn(\"Trip deletion failed: ownership check failed\", { tripId, ownerId });\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      invalidateCommuteStats(DEFAULT_COMMUTE_ID);\n      logger.info(\"Trip deleted\", { tripId, ownerId });\n      return true;\n    } else {\n      // No ownership check (for admin operations or backward compatibility)\n      const result = db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM trips WHERE id = ?\").run(tripId);\n\n      if (result.changes > 0) {\n        invalidateCommuteStats(DEFAULT_COMMUTE_ID);\n        logger.info(\"Trip deleted (admin)\", { tripId });\n        return true;\n      }\n      return false;\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    logger.error(\"Failed to delete trip\", error instanceof Error ? error : undefined);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Journal Query API\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Get trip records with pagination and optional ownership filtering.\n *\n * @param params - Query parameters including optional ownerId for access control\n */\nexport function getTrips(params: {\n  limit?: number;\n  offset?: number;\n  startDate?: string;\n  endDate?: string;\n  originId?: string;\n  destinationId?: string;\n  line?: string;\n  source?: TripSource;\n  ownerId?: string; // For ownership filtering - if not provided, returns all trips (admin only)\n}): TripRecord[] {\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n\n  if (!db) {\n    recordTripQueryDuration(0);\n    recordTripQueried(false);\n    return [];\n  }\n\n  const {\n    limit = 50,\n    offset = 0,\n    startDate,\n    endDate,\n    originId,\n    destinationId,\n    line,\n    source,\n    ownerId,\n  } = params;\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"1=1\"];\n  const sqlParams: unknown[] = [];\n\n  if (ownerId) {\n    conditions.push(\"owner_id = ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(ownerId);\n  }\n\n  if (startDate) {\n    conditions.push(\"date >= ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(startDate);\n  }\n  if (endDate) {\n    conditions.push(\"date <= ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(endDate);\n  }\n  if (originId) {\n    conditions.push(\"origin_station_id = ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(originId);\n  }\n  if (destinationId) {\n    conditions.push(\"destination_station_id = ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(destinationId);\n  }\n  if (line) {\n    conditions.push(\"line = ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(line);\n  }\n  if (source) {\n    conditions.push(\"source = ?\");\n    sqlParams.push(source);\n  }\n\n  sqlParams.push(limit, offset);\n\n  const rows = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        id, date, origin_station_id, origin_station_name,\n        destination_station_id, destination_station_name,\n        line, direction, departure_time, arrival_time,\n        actual_duration_minutes, scheduled_duration_minutes,\n        source, notes, owner_id\n      FROM trips\n      WHERE ${conditions.join(\" AND \")}\n      ORDER BY departure_time DESC\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...sqlParams) as TripRecordRow[];\n\n  const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n  recordTripQueryDuration(duration);\n  recordTripQueried(true);\n\n  return rows.map(rowToTripRecord);\n}\n\ninterface TripRecordRow {\n  id: string;\n  date: string;\n  origin_station_id: string;\n  origin_station_name: string;\n  destination_station_id: string;\n  destination_station_name: string;\n  line: string;\n  direction: string;\n  departure_time: number;\n  arrival_time: number;\n  actual_duration_minutes: number;\n  scheduled_duration_minutes: number | null;\n  source: string;\n  notes: string | null;\n  owner_id: string;\n}\n\nfunction rowToTripRecord(row: TripRecordRow): TripRecord & { ownerId?: string } {\n  return {\n    id: row.id,\n    date: row.date,\n    origin: { stationId: row.origin_station_id, stationName: row.origin_station_name },\n    destination: {\n      stationId: row.destination_station_id,\n      stationName: row.destination_station_name,\n    },\n    line: row.line,\n    departureTime: row.departure_time,\n    arrivalTime: row.arrival_time,\n    actualDurationMinutes: row.actual_duration_minutes,\n    scheduledDurationMinutes: row.scheduled_duration_minutes ?? undefined,\n    source: row.source as TripSource,\n    notes: row.notes ?? undefined,\n    ownerId: row.owner_id,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Get a single trip by ID.\n */\nexport function getTripById(tripId: string): (TripRecord & { ownerId?: string }) | null {\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n\n  if (!db) {\n    recordTripQueryDuration(0);\n    recordTripQueried(false);\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  const row = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        id, date, origin_station_id, origin_station_name,\n        destination_station_id, destination_station_name,\n        line, direction, departure_time, arrival_time,\n        actual_duration_minutes, scheduled_duration_minutes,\n        source, notes, owner_id\n      FROM trips\n      WHERE id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(tripId) as TripRecordRow | undefined;\n\n  const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n  recordTripQueryDuration(duration);\n  recordTripQueried(!!row);\n\n  return row ? rowToTripRecord(row) : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get trips for a specific date range.\n */\nexport function getTripsByDateRange(startDate: string, endDate: string): TripRecord[] {\n  return getTrips({ startDate, endDate, limit: 1000 });\n}\n\n/**\n * Get recent trips for a station.\n */\nexport function getRecentTripsForStation(stationId: string, limit: number = 10): TripRecord[] {\n  return getTrips({\n    originId: stationId,\n    destinationId: stationId,\n    limit,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a trip belongs to a specific owner.\n *\n * @param tripId - Trip ID to check\n * @param ownerId - Owner ID to verify\n * @returns true if the trip belongs to the owner\n */\nexport function checkTripOwnership(tripId: string, ownerId: string): boolean {\n  if (!db) return false;\n\n  const row = db.prepare(\"SELECT owner_id FROM trips WHERE id = ?\").get(tripId) as\n    | { owner_id: string }\n    | undefined;\n\n  return row?.owner_id === ownerId || row?.owner_id === DEFAULT_OWNER_ID;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the owner ID of a trip.\n *\n * @param tripId - Trip ID to query\n * @returns Owner ID or undefined if trip not found\n */\nexport function getTripOwner(tripId: string): string | undefined {\n  if (!db) return undefined;\n\n  const row = db.prepare(\"SELECT owner_id FROM trips WHERE id = ?\").get(tripId) as\n    | { owner_id: string }\n    | undefined;\n\n  return row?.owner_id;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Statistics Calculation\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Calculate commute statistics for a route.\n *\n * @param commuteId - Commute ID to calculate stats for\n * @param ownerId - Optional owner ID for filtering user-specific stats\n */\nexport function calculateCommuteStats(\n  commuteId: string = DEFAULT_COMMUTE_ID,\n  ownerId?: string\n): CommuteStats | null {\n  if (!db) return null;\n\n  // Check cache first (skip cache if owner-specific query)\n  const cached = !ownerId ? getCachedCommuteStats(commuteId) : null;\n  if (cached && Date.now() - cached.last_updated < 300_000) {\n    // Cache valid for 5 minutes\n    return {\n      commuteId: cached.commute_id,\n      averageDurationMinutes: cached.average_duration_minutes,\n      medianDurationMinutes: cached.median_duration_minutes,\n      stdDevMinutes: cached.std_dev_minutes,\n      totalTrips: cached.total_trips,\n      tripsThisWeek: cached.trips_this_week,\n      trend: cached.trend,\n      averageDelayMinutes: cached.average_delay_minutes,\n      maxDelayMinutes: cached.max_delay_minutes,\n      onTimePercentage: cached.on_time_percentage,\n      records: getTrips({ limit: 90, ownerId }),\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Get all trip records for statistics with ownership filter\n  const allTrips = getTrips({ limit: 500, ownerId });\n\n  if (allTrips.length === 0) {\n    return {\n      commuteId,\n      averageDurationMinutes: 0,\n      medianDurationMinutes: 0,\n      stdDevMinutes: 0,\n      totalTrips: 0,\n      tripsThisWeek: 0,\n      trend: 0,\n      averageDelayMinutes: 0,\n      maxDelayMinutes: 0,\n      onTimePercentage: 0,\n      records: [],\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Calculate duration statistics\n  const durations = allTrips.map((t) => t.actualDurationMinutes).sort((a, b) => a - b);\n  const avgDuration = durations.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d, 0) / durations.length;\n  // Calculate median: average of two middle values for even-length arrays\n  const mid = Math.floor(durations.length / 2);\n  const medianDuration =\n    durations.length % 2 === 0\n      ? (durations[mid - 1]! + durations[mid]!) / 2\n      : (durations[mid] ?? 0);\n\n  // Calculate standard deviation\n  const variance =\n    durations.reduce((sum, d) => sum + Math.pow(d - avgDuration, 2), 0) / durations.length;\n  const stdDev = Math.sqrt(variance);\n\n  // Calculate delay statistics - filter trips that have scheduledDurationMinutes set\n  const tripsWithSchedule = allTrips.filter((t) => t.scheduledDurationMinutes != null);\n  const delays = tripsWithSchedule.map((t) => ({\n    delay: t.actualDurationMinutes - (t.scheduledDurationMinutes ?? 0),\n    onTime: Math.abs(t.actualDurationMinutes - (t.scheduledDurationMinutes ?? 0)) <= 2,\n  }));\n\n  const avgDelay =\n    delays.length > 0 ? delays.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d.delay, 0) / delays.length : 0;\n  const maxDelay = delays.length > 0 ? Math.max(...delays.map((d) => d.delay)) : 0;\n  const onTimeCount = delays.filter((d) => d.onTime).length;\n  const onTimePercentage = delays.length > 0 ? (onTimeCount / delays.length) * 100 : 0;\n\n  // Calculate trips this week\n  const now = new Date();\n  const weekStart = new Date(now);\n  weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - now.getDay());\n  weekStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n  const weekStartISO = weekStart.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]!;\n  const tripsThisWeek = allTrips.filter((t) => t.date >= weekStartISO).length;\n\n  // Calculate trend vs prior 4 weeks\n  const fourWeeksAgo = new Date(weekStart);\n  fourWeeksAgo.setDate(weekStart.getDate() - 28);\n  const fourWeeksAgoISO = fourWeeksAgo.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]!;\n\n  const priorWeekTrips = allTrips.filter(\n    (t) => t.date >= fourWeeksAgoISO && t.date < weekStartISO\n  ).length;\n  const prior4WeekAvg = priorWeekTrips / 4;\n  // If no prior week data, treat as positive trend when we have current week data\n  const trend =\n    prior4WeekAvg > 0\n      ? ((tripsThisWeek - prior4WeekAvg) / prior4WeekAvg) * 100\n      : tripsThisWeek > 0\n        ? 100\n        : 0;\n\n  const stats: CommuteStats = {\n    commuteId,\n    averageDurationMinutes: Math.round(avgDuration * 10) / 10,\n    medianDurationMinutes: medianDuration,\n    stdDevMinutes: Math.round(stdDev * 10) / 10,\n    totalTrips: allTrips.length,\n    tripsThisWeek,\n    trend: Math.round(trend * 10) / 10,\n    averageDelayMinutes: Math.round(avgDelay * 10) / 10,\n    maxDelayMinutes: Math.round(maxDelay),\n    onTimePercentage: Math.round(onTimePercentage * 10) / 10,\n    records: allTrips.slice(0, 90),\n  };\n\n  // Cache the stats (only for non-owner-specific queries)\n  if (!ownerId) {\n    cacheCommuteStats(stats);\n  }\n\n  return stats;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get cached commute statistics.\n */\nfunction getCachedCommuteStats(commuteId: string): {\n  commute_id: string;\n  average_duration_minutes: number;\n  median_duration_minutes: number;\n  std_dev_minutes: number;\n  total_trips: number;\n  trips_this_week: number;\n  trend: number;\n  average_delay_minutes: number;\n  max_delay_minutes: number;\n  on_time_percentage: number;\n  last_updated: number;\n} | null {\n  if (!db) return null;\n\n  return db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM commute_stats WHERE commute_id = ?\")\n    .get(commuteId) as ReturnType<typeof getCachedCommuteStats>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Cache commute statistics.\n */\nfunction cacheCommuteStats(stats: CommuteStats): void {\n  if (!db) return;\n\n  const now = Date.now();\n\n  db.prepare(\n    `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO commute_stats (\n      commute_id, average_duration_minutes, median_duration_minutes,\n      std_dev_minutes, total_trips, trips_this_week, trend,\n      average_delay_minutes, max_delay_minutes, on_time_percentage,\n      last_updated\n    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    stats.commuteId,\n    stats.averageDurationMinutes,\n    stats.medianDurationMinutes,\n    stats.stdDevMinutes,\n    stats.totalTrips,\n    stats.tripsThisWeek,\n    stats.trend,\n    stats.averageDelayMinutes,\n    stats.maxDelayMinutes,\n    stats.onTimePercentage,\n    now\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Invalidate commute stats cache for all commutes.\n * Since trips are global (not tied to specific commutes), any trip recording\n * invalidates all cached stats.\n */\n\nfunction invalidateCommuteStats(_commuteId?: string): void {\n  if (!db) return;\n\n  // Clear all commute stats since trips are global\n  db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM commute_stats\").run();\n}\n\n/**\n * Get trip count for a specific date.\n */\nexport function getTripCountForDate(date: string): number {\n  if (!db) return 0;\n\n  const result = db.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM trips WHERE date = ?\").get(date) as {\n    count: number;\n  };\n\n  return result.count;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get total trip count.\n */\nexport function getTotalTripCount(): number {\n  if (!db) return 0;\n\n  const result = db.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM trips\").get() as { count: number };\n\n  return result.count;\n}\n\n/**\n * Clean up old trip records (older than 90 days, keep last 500).\n */\nexport function cleanupOldTrips(): number {\n  if (!db) return 0;\n\n  const ninetyDaysAgo = new Date();\n  ninetyDaysAgo.setDate(ninetyDaysAgo.getDate() - 90);\n  const cutoffDate = ninetyDaysAgo.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]!;\n\n  // Get count of trips older than 90 days\n  const oldTripsCount = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM trips WHERE date < ?\")\n    .get(cutoffDate) as { count: number };\n\n  const totalTrips = getTotalTripCount();\n\n  // Only delete if we have more than 500 total AND some are old\n  if (totalTrips > 500 && oldTripsCount.count > 0) {\n    const toDelete = totalTrips - 500;\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `DELETE FROM trips\n         WHERE date < ?\n         ORDER BY departure_time ASC\n         LIMIT ?`\n      )\n      .run(cutoffDate, toDelete);\n\n    logger.info(\"Trips cleanup completed\", {\n      deletedCount: result.changes,\n      remainingCount: getTotalTripCount(),\n    });\n\n    return result.changes;\n  }\n\n  return 0;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":718,"oldLines":3,"newStart":718,"newLines":14,"lines":[" ","   return 0;"," }","+","+/**","+ * Reset trip tracking module state (for testing only).","+ *","+ * RequestInit): Promise<Response>;\n}): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  if (res.status !== 200) {\n    throw new Error(`Failed to get CSRF token:     if (existsSync(file)) {\n            unlinkSync(file);\n          }\n        } catch {\n          // Ignore cleanup errors\n        }\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Clean up on process exit process.exit(0);\n    });\n  });\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    // Use a temp file database so the module and test share the same database\n    testDbPath = join(tmpdir(), expect(result.endpointHash).toBeDefined();\n      expect(result.endpointHash).toHaveLength(64); // SHA-256 hex length\n    });\n\n    it(\"updates existing subscription\", () => {\n      const sub1 = createTestSubscription({\n        endpoint: \"https://example.com/push/2\",\n        favorites: [{ id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" }],\n      });\n\n      upsertSubscription(sub1);\n\n      // Update with different favorites\n      const sub2 = createTestSubscription({\n        endpoint: \"https://example.com/push/2\",\n        favorites: [\n          { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n          { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\"], direction: \"north\" },\n        ],\n      });\n\n      const result = upsertSubscription(sub2);\n      expect(result.success).toBe(true);\n\n      // Verify only one subscription exists for this endpoint\n      const all = getAllSubscriptions();\n      const matching = all.filter((s) => s.endpoint === \"https://example.com/push/2\");\n      expect(matching).toHaveLength(1);\n      // Favorites is stored as JSON string, parse it to verify\n      const favorites = JSON.parse(matching[0]?.favorites ?? \"[]\");\n      expect(favorites).toHaveLength(2);\n    });\n\n    it(\"stores subscription keys\", () => {\n      const sub = createTestSubscription({\n        endpoint: \"https://example.com/push/3\",\n        p256dh: \"test-p256dh\",\n        auth: \"test-auth\",\n      });\n\n      upsertSubscription(sub);\n\n      const expect(created?.auth).toBe(\"test-auth\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"stores favorites as JSON\", () => {\n      const sub = createTestSubscription({\n        endpoint: \"https://example.com/push/4\",\n       ],\n      });\n\n      upsertSubscription(sub);\n\n      const all = getAllSubscriptions();\n      const created = all.find((s) => s.endpoint === \"https://example.com/push/4\");\n\n      // Favorites is stored as JSON string\n      expect(created?.favorites).toBe(\n        '[{\"id\":\"fav-1\",\"stationId\":\"101\",\"lines\":[\"1\"],\"direction\":\"both\"},{\"id\":\"fav-2\",\"stationId\":\"725\",\"lines\":[\"A\",\"C\"],\"direction\":\"south\"}]'\n      );\n      // Verify it parses correctly\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(created?.favorites ?? \"[]\");\n      expect(parsed).toEqual([\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\", \"C\"], direction: \"south\" },\n      ]);\n    });\n\n    it(\"stores quiet hours settings\", () => {\n      const sub = expect(parsed).toEqual({ enabled: true, startHour: 23, endHour: 6 });\n    });\n\n    it(\"stores morning scores\", () => {\n      const sub = createTestSubscription({\n        endpoint: \"https://example.com/push/6\",\n        morningScores: {\n          \"101\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.8, 0.9, 0.7] },\n          \"725\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.6, 0.85] },\n        },\n      });\n\n      upsertSubscription(sub);\n\n      const all = getAllSubscriptions();\n      const created = all.find((s) => s.endpoint === \"https://example.com/push/6\");\n\n      // morningScores is stored as JSON string\n      expect(created?.morningScores).toBe(\n        '{\"101\":{\"line\":\"1\",\"scores\":[0.8,0.9,0.7]},\"725\":{\"line\":\"A\",\"scores\":[0.6,0.85]}}'\n      );\n      // ...overrides,\n  ];\n}\n\nfunction createMorningScores(base: number = 0.5): MorningScoreMap {\n  return {\n    \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [base + 0.3, base + 0.2, base + 0.1] },\n    \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [base + 0.1, base + 0.15, base + 0.05] },\n    \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [base + 0.05, base + 0.08, base + 0.03] },\n  };\n}\n\n// 3600,\n        end: now + 3600,\n      },\n      description: \"Delays on 1 train\",\n      severity: \"warning\",\n      source: \"official\",\n      url: null,\n      cause: null,\n    },\n    ...overrides,\n  ];\n}\n\nfunction createMorningScores(base: number = 0.5): MorningScoreMap {\n  return {\n    \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [base + 0.3, base + 0.2, base + 0.1] },\n    \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [base + 0.1, base + 0.15, base + 0.05] },\n    \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [base + 0.05, base + 0.08, base + 0.03] },\n  };\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Push Briefing Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let testDbPath: string;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDbPath = join(tmpdir(), `test-push-briefing-${crypto.randomUUID()}.db`);\n    initPushDatabase(testDbPath);\n\n    // Set up default alerts\n    setAlertsForTesting(createMockAlerts());\n  });\n\n  afterEach(() => {\n    if (existsSync(testDbPath)) {\n      unlinkSync(testDbPath);\n    }\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Briefing Payload Generation\", () => {\n    it(\"generates payload for favorites with lines\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\"], direction: \"north\" },\n      ];\n\n      const morningScores: MorningScoreMap = {\n        \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.8, 0.7, 0.6] },\n        \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.5, 0.4, 0.3] },\n      };\n\n      // Import and test the buildBriefingPayload function\n      // Since it's not exported, we'll test through the scheduler\n      const payload = {\n        alertId: \"morning-briefing\",\n        title: \"Good morning! Subway status\",\n        body: \"(1) (A) — All clear! No active alerts.\",\n        lines: [\"1\", \"A\"],\n        severity: \"info\" as const,\n        changeType: \"new\" as const,\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n      };\n\n expect(payload.lines).toContain(\"A\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"includes all lines from favorites\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", expect(allLines).toContain(\"C\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"sorts favorites by morning score\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\"], direction: \"north\" },\n        { id: \"fav-3\", stationId: \"726\", lines: [\"C\"], direction: \"south\" },\n      ];\n\n      const morningScores: MorningScoreMap = {\n        \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.9, 0.8, 0.7] }, // Highest\n        \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.5, 0.4, 0.3] }, // Middle\n        \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [0.2, 0.1, 0.05] }, // Lowest\n      };\n\n      const sorted = [...favorites].sort((a, b) => {\n        const scoreA = morningScores[a.id] ? morningScores[a.id]!.scores[0]! : 0;\n        const scoreB = morningScores[b.id] ? morningScores[b.id]!.scores[0]! : 0;\n        return scoreB - scoreA;\n      });\n\n      expect(sorted[0]?.id).toBe(\"fav-1\");\n      expect(sorted[1]?.id).toBe(\"fav-2\");\n      expect(sorted[2]?.id).toBe(\"fav-3\");\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Alert Integration\", () => {\n ];\n\n      const alerts = getAllAlerts();\n      const warningOrSevere = alerts.filter(\n        (a) => a.severity === \"warning\" || a.severity === \"severe\"\n      );\n\n   it(\"respects quiet hours when enabled\", () => {\n      const quietHours = {\n        enabled: true,\n        startHour: 22,\n        endHour: 7,\n      };\n\n      // Test during quiet hours (11 PM)\n      const mockDate = new Date();\n      mockDate.setHours(23);\n      vi.spyOn(global, \"Date\").mockImplementation(() => mockDate as unknown as Date);\n\n      const currentHour = new Date().getHours();\n\n      // Quiet hours from 10 PM to 7 AM\n      if (quietHours.startHour <= quietHours.endHour) {\n        const inQuietHours =\n          currentHour >= quietHours.startHour && currentHour < quietHours.endHour;\n        expect(inQuietHours).toBe(currentHour >= 22 || currentHour < 7);\n      } else {\n        // Spans midnight\n        const inQuietHours =\n          currentHour >= quietHours.startHour || currentHour < quietHours.endHour;\n        expect(inQuietHours).toBe(true);\n      }\n\n      vi.restoreAllMocks();\n    });\n\n    it(\"allows briefing when quiet hours disabled\", () => {\n      const quietHours = {\n        enabled: false,\n        startHour: 22,\n        endHour: 7,\n      };\n\n      expect(quietHours.enabled).toBe(false);\n    });\n\n    it(\"handles quiet hours spanning midnight\", () => {\n      const quietHours = {\n        enabled: true,\n        startHour: 22,\n        endHour: 7,\n      };\n\n      // Test at 3 AM (should be in quiet hours)\n      const mockDate = new Date();\n      mockDate.setHours(3);\n      vi.spyOn(global, \"Date\").mockImplementation(() => mockDate as unknown as Date);\n\n      const currentHour = new Date().getHours();\n\n      // Since startHour > endHour, this spans midnight\n      const inQuietHours = currentHour >= quietHours.startHour || currentHour < quietHours.endHour;\n\n  });\n\n      const result = upsertSubscription(sub);\n      expect(result.success).toBe(true);\n\n      const all = getAllSubscriptions();\n      expect(all.length).toBe(1);\n      expect(all[0]?.endpoint).toBe(\"https://example.com/push/briefing-test\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"parses favorites from JSON\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\", \"C\"], direction: \"north\" },\n      ];\n\n      const sub = 3600,\n        end: now + 3600,\n      },\n      description: \"Delays on 1 train\",\n      severity: \"warning\",\n      source: \"official\",\n      url: null,\n      cause: null,\n    },\n    ...overrides,\n  ];\n}\n\nfunction createMorningScores(base: number = 0.5): MorningScoreMap {\n  return {\n    \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [base + 0.3, base + 0.2, base + 0.1] },\n    \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [base + 0.1, base + 0.15, base + 0.05] },\n    \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [base + 0.05, base + 0.08, base + 0.03] },\n  };\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe(\"Push Briefing Integration Tests\", () => {\n  let testDbPath: string;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDbPath = join(tmpdir(), `test-push-briefing-${crypto.randomUUID()}.db`);\n    initPushDatabase(testDbPath);\n\n    // Set up default alerts\n    setAlertsForTesting(createMockAlerts());\n  });\n\n  afterEach(() => {\n    if (existsSync(testDbPath)) {\n      unlinkSync(testDbPath);\n    }\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Briefing Payload Generation\", () => {\n    it(\"generates payload for favorites with lines\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\"], direction: \"north\" },\n      ];\n\n      const morningScores: MorningScoreMap = {\n        \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.8, 0.7, 0.6] },\n        \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.5, 0.4, 0.3] },\n      };\n\n      // Import and test the buildBriefingPayload function\n      // Since it's not exported, we'll test through the scheduler\n      const payload = {\n        alertId: \"morning-briefing\",\n        title: \"Good morning! Subway status\",\n        body: \"(1) (A) — All clear! No active alerts.\",\n        lines: [\"1\", \"A\"],\n        severity: \"info\" as const,\n        changeType: \"new\" as const,\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n      };\n\n lines: [\"1\", \"2\", \"3\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\", \"C\"], direction: \"north\" },\n      ];\n\n      const allLines = new expect(allLines).toContain(\"C\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"sorts favorites by morning score\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\"], direction: \"north\" },\n        { id: \"fav-3\", stationId: \"726\", lines: [\"C\"], direction: \"south\" },\n      ];\n\n      const morningScores: MorningScoreMap = {\n        \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.9, 0.8, 0.7] }, // Highest\n        \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.5, 0.4, 0.3] }, // Middle\n        \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [0.2, 0.1, 0.05] }, // Lowest\n      };\n\n      const sorted = [...favorites].sort((a, b) => {\n        const scoreA = morningScores[a.id] ? morningScores[a.id]!.scores[0]! : 0;\n        const scoreB = morningScores[b.id] ? morningScores[b.id]!.scores[0]! : 0;\n        return scoreB - scoreA;\n      });\n\n      expect(sorted[0]?.id).toBe(\"fav-1\");\n      expect(sorted[1]?.id).toBe(\"fav-2\");\n      expect(sorted[2]?.id).toBe(\"fav-3\");\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Alert Integration\", () => {\n ];\n\n      const alerts = getAllAlerts();\n      const warningOrSevere = alerts.filter(\n        (a) => a.severity === \"warning\" || a.severity === \"severe\"\n      );\n\n   });\n\n    it(\"returns all clear when no active alerts\", () => {\n      // Set up empty alerts\n      setAlertsForTesting([]);\n\n      const alerts = getAllAlerts();\n      const activeAlerts =   it(\"respects quiet hours when enabled\", () => {\n      const quietHours = {\n        enabled: true,\n        startHour: 22,\n        endHour: 7,\n      };\n\n      // Test during quiet hours (11 PM)\n      const mockDate = new Date();\n      mockDate.setHours(23);\n      vi.spyOn(global, \"Date\").mockImplementation(() => mockDate as unknown as Date);\n\n      const currentHour = new Date().getHours();\n\n      // Quiet hours from 10 PM to 7 AM\n      if (quietHours.startHour <= quietHours.endHour) {\n        const inQuietHours =\n          currentHour >= quietHours.startHour && currentHour < quietHours.endHour;\n        expect(inQuietHours).toBe(currentHour >= 22 || currentHour < 7);\n      } else {\n        // Spans midnight\n        const inQuietHours =\n });\n\n    it(\"handles quiet hours spanning midnight\", () => {\n      const quietHours = {\n        enabled: true,\n        startHour: 22,\n        endHour: 7,\n      };\n\n      // Test at 3 AM (should be in quiet hours)\n      const mockDate = new Date();\n      mockDate.setHours(3);\n      vi.spyOn(global, \"Date\").mockImplementation(() => mockDate as unknown as Date);\n\n      const currentHour = new Date().getHours();\n\n      // Since startHour > endHour, this spans midnight\n      const inQuietHours = currentHour >= quietHours.startHour || currentHour < quietHours.endHour;\n\n  });\n\n      const result = upsertSubscription(sub);\n      expect(result.success).toBe(true);\n\n      const all = getAllSubscriptions();\n      expect(all.length).toBe(1);\n      expect(all[0]?.endpoint).toBe(\"https://example.com/push/briefing-test\");\n    });\n\n    it(\"parses favorites from JSON\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: \"fav-1\", stationId: \"101\", lines: [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\", \"C\"], direction: \"north\" },\n      ];\n\n      const sub =
